flagged.detail: The c1 cloze deletion contains only an image (no text), so the recalled/blanked content is image-only; the readable answer text comes entirely from the Extra field.

notes: This batch is a single hand-authored Pankow P/S (psych/sociology) cloze deck and is of very high quality: all 257 cards are Cloze-8d4a6 with balanced {{cN::...}} markup, balanced HTML (b/u/div/font) tags, no LaTeX/MathJax, and clean Q/A correspondence where the revealed deletion fits the blank. No errors or warnings were found. The only flag is one info-level card (1582507853930) whose c1 deletion is an image with no text, making the tested content image-only even though the Extra field still provides readable answer text.
